title: Cuelight agent card
description: A role definition: who this agent is, which harness runs it, what it may touch, and the prompt that shapes it.

description.description: One line shown in the library sidebar.

permissions.description: Least privilege that works: plan = read-only analysis, edit = file changes in the worktree, edit+exec = may also run commands (tests, builds).

prompt.description: The system-level role prompt. Specific and testable beats vibes.

structuredOutput.description: Optional JSON schema the session's final message must satisfy; enables structured-verdict kill gates.
